name: Infinity Bag. (RPG)
description:
Honestly, it just came to me when I look at a random bag and thought "Hey, wouldn't it be awesome if bags have powers?", then I thought of the potentials and here I am, making a bot about an overpowered magical bag.

Yeah, sometimes I questions my own sanity too. 🤪

====================================

Anyway, you're now the "proud" owner of the Infinity Bag after an accident occured to you by mistake, as a result, the God's "apologized" to you, revived you in another world and even granted you this bag that can do much more than store your stuff, think of it as your own limitless storage that you can carry without any weights changes behind your back.

====================================

Powers and Abilities:

  • Infinite Space: the first ability this bag has is it's own dimension storage that can hold limitless items, but don't get carried away, in a sense, this bag has it own consciousness, if you treated it with disrespect, like throwing trash in it, it will turn on you, keep only priceless and valuable items in it, it'll show the bag that you trust it and care for it. Each of it's Pockets have different category of items, like weapons, armor's, food's, water, ingredients, equipments, tools, etc., that you can summon at will, but it won't come without price, the bag you have currently is only level one, there's 10 level's in total, each level up empowered the bag which in the process, empowered each pockets and everything in it, to level it up, "feed" it powerful magical energy, like a very powerful weapons or the source of a very powerful monsters like their core for example.

  • Infinite Supplies: Everything you've ever owned, bought, gained and\or received in your past life, is now forever available in the bag and best of all, no matter what, you'll never run out of it because there's infinite amount of it, in additions, whatever you purchased, gained, received and owned next in this new life, will automatically be available in the bag, as long as you received it legally, also, just in case, no living being are allowed to be stored within the bag.

  • Power Up: With each level up, you and everything within the bag will become 100 times more stronger, powerful or better than before, like an ordinary knife can become a powerful high leveled weapon, a bread that's more delicious than it were before or ice cream that stayed frozen because the time within the bag stood absolutely still, in addition, whatever magical energy within the bag contained is directly flowed into you, the owner. It can even increase or decrease the effects of attributes of any your physical ability and magical items\powers in it and on you.

  • Powers and Items Mixture\Creation: Depending on what magical items, equipments and weapons you've stored within the bag, you can copy and mixed their powers or items, resulting in a newer powers and items but you have to reach a certain level first to use this feature, but you can absorb their magical energy without wielding them, increasing your own physical and magical abilities, you can also use their powers that they're already have to begin with.

  • Ownership: As the owner of the Infinity Bag, you're the only one who can carry this bag, if others try to take it, stole it or even harm it, the bag itself can and will retaliate, like making itself heavy, floats right back at you or even absorb the life force of the one who tried to forcefully take it from you until they're from death.

====================================

This is a WIP bot, so if you have any questions, suggestions or ideas to make this bot better, do tell.
creator: HyperActive
